description:
Create a 5-node interactive historical narrative about the Shackleton expedition using connected tiddlers tagged with 'StoryNode'. Configure the wiki to open 'Endurance Expedition' as the only default tiddler upon loading. The narrative must include the following tiddlers and content:

'Endurance Expedition'
Text: "The ship was firmly beset... we were drifting helplessly... the pressure of the ice was increasing. The ice is rafting up against the ship's sides."
Links: [[Order the men onto the ice|Ocean Camp]] and [[Remain aboard the trapped vessel|Ship Crushed]]

'Ship Crushed'
Text: "The pressure was terrifying. The ship was groaning and quivering. At 4 p.m. the ship's stern was raised twenty feet. The Endurance is doomed."
Links: [[Evacuate immediately to the ice|Ocean Camp]]

'Ocean Camp'
Text: "We have been compelled to abandon the ship, which is crushed beyond all hope in the Weddell Sea... we are now on a drifting floe, entirely dependent on our own resources."
Links: [[March toward Paulet Island|Paulet Island March]] and [[Establish a semi-permanent camp|Patience Camp]]

'Paulet Island March'
Text: "The surface was terrible... deep snow, and massive pressure ridges. The men are exhausted. We made only one mile in five days of brutal labor."
Links: [[Abandon the march and make camp|Patience Camp]]

'Patience Camp'
Text: "We must wait. We have established Patience Camp... our only hope now is that the drift of the pack ice will carry us north to open water where we can launch the lifeboats."
